extortion.description: Founded in 1915, the Doumen Group is a family-owned company with branches in Périgueux, Bordeaux, Villeneuve-sur-Lot, Nmes and Avignon. Its development is based on the experience and skills of more than 600 employees who offer you a wide range of solutions in transportation, logistics and material handling. It is a true diversification aimed at supporting our customers in their various projects, with a priority that drives us every day: quality of service and reliable feedback is ------ IMPOSSIBLE.
